mapper.sql: select id, user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, total_line_weight, max_line_weight, community_weight, previous_community_weight, dividend_weight, settle_status, batch_no, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, deleted from t_stake_hosting_global_dividend_weight_snapshot
mapper.insert: insert into t_stake_hosting_global_dividend_weight_snapshot ( user_id, account, week_start_time, week_end_time, total_line_weight, max_line_weight, community_weight, previous_community_weight, dividend_weight, settle_status, create_time, update_time, deleted ) values ( #{userId}, #{account}, #{weekStartTime}, #{weekEndTime}, #{totalLineWeight}, #{maxLineWeight}, #{communityWeight}, #{previousCommunityWeight}, #{dividendWeight}, 0, now(), now(), 0 ) on duplicate key update account = values(account), week_end_time = values(week_end_time), total_line_weight = values(total_line_weight), max_line_weight = values(max_line_weight), community_weight = values(community_weight), previous_community_weight = values(previous_community_weight), dividend_weight = values(dividend_weight), settle_status = if(settle_status = 1, settle_status, values(settle_status)), update_time = now()
mapper.select: select community_weight from t_stake_hosting_global_dividend_weight_snapshot where user_id = #{userId} and week_start_time < #{weekStartTime} and deleted = 0 order by week_start_time desc limit 1
